definitions.text: Not normal; odd, unusual, surprising, out of the ordinary, often with a negative connotation.
examples: He thought it strange that his girlfriend wore shorts in the winter.

definitions.text: Unfamiliar, not yet part of one's experience.
examples: I moved to a strange town when I was ten.

definitions.text: Outside of one's current relationship; unfamiliar.
To wonder; to be astonished at (something).
Sex outside of one's current relationship.
